languages.text: {n}Вы понимаете: открывшийся фрагмент — лишь малая часть чего-то несоизмеримо большего. Механизм уходит вглубь, под безупречную имитацию дворцового моста, вплетаясь в его основание. Вероятно, если вывести этот узел из строя, последствия поломки отзовутся по всей конструкции.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы понимаете: открывшийся фрагмент — лишь малая часть чего-то несоизмеримо большего. Механизм уходит вглубь, под безупречную имитацию дворцового моста, вплетаясь в его основание. Вероятно, если вывести этот узел из строя, последствия поломки отзовутся по всей конструкции.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы понимаете: открывшийся фрагмент — лишь малая часть чего-то несоизмеримо большего. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你意识到，你所发现的这块碎片不过是冰山一角。那装置向地下深处延伸，潜藏在那座完美复刻的宫殿桥梁之下，与整座建筑的地基纠缠在一起。若是关闭这台装置，由此引发的连锁反应恐怕会波及整座建筑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你意识到，你所发现的这块碎片不过是冰山一角。那装置向地下深处延伸，潜藏在那座完美复刻的宫殿桥梁之下，与整座建筑的地基纠缠在一起。若是关闭这台装置，由此引发的连锁反应恐怕会波及整座建筑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous vous rendez compte que le fragment que vous avez découvert appartient à un système incommensurablement plus grand, qui s'étend dans les profondeurs de la terre et s'entrelace avec les fondations du pont du palais reproduit à la perfection. Si cet appareil était neutralisé, l'effet se répercuterait dans toute la structure.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous rendez compte que le fragment que vous avez découvert appartient à un système incommensurablement plus grand, qui s'étend dans les profondeurs de la terre et s'entrelace avec les fondations du pont du palais reproduit à la perfection. Si cet appareil était neutralisé, l'effet se répercuterait dans toute la structure.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Keşfettiğin parçanın, ölçülemeyecek kadar büyük bir şeyin sadece küçük bir kısmı olduğunu fark ediyorsun. Mekanizma; yeraltının derinliklerine, saray köprüsünün kusursuz kopyasının altına, onun temelleriyle iç içe geçecek kadar uzanıyor. Bu cihaz devre dışı bırakılırsa kesintinin yansımaları yapının dört bir yanında yankılanacaktır.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Keşfettiğin parçanın, ölçülemeyecek kadar büyük bir şeyin sadece küçük bir kısmı olduğunu fark ediyorsun. Bu cihaz devre dışı bırakılırsa kesintinin yansımaları yapının dört bir yanında yankılanacaktır.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te das cuenta de que el fragmento que has descubierto es solo una pequeña parte de algo infinitamente mayor. El mecanismo se extiende por las profundidades de la tierra, bajo la fiel recreación del puente del palacio, y se entrelaza con sus cimientos. Si se desactivara, las repercusiones del apagado afectarían a toda la estructura.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te das cuenta de que el fragmento que has descubierto es solo una pequeña parte de algo infinitamente mayor. El mecanismo se extiende por las profundidades de la tierra, bajo la fiel recreación del puente del palacio, y se entrelaza con sus cimientos. Si se desactivara, las repercusiones del apagado afectarían a toda la estructura.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Fragment, das du entdeckt hast, ist nur ein winziger Teil von etwas deutlich Größerem. Der Mechanismus reicht tief in den Boden, unter der makellosen Kopie der Palastbrücke, eng verwoben, mit deren Grundfesten. Würde dieses Gerät deaktiviert, ließe der Nachhall seines Ausfalls die gesamte Struktur erzittern.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Fragment, das du entdeckt hast, ist nur ein winziger Teil von etwas deutlich Größerem. Der Mechanismus reicht tief in den Boden, unter der makellosen Kopie der Palastbrücke, eng verwoben, mit deren Grundfesten. Würde dieses Gerät deaktiviert, ließe der Nachhall seines Ausfalls die gesamte Struktur erzittern.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたが発見した断片は、計り知れないほど大きなもののほんの一部に過ぎないことに気づく。その機構は、宮殿の橋の完璧な再現の下に、その基礎と絡み合って深く地下に延びている。この装置が停止すれば、その影響は構造全体に波及するだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You realise that the fragment you discovered is only a small part of something immeasurably larger. The mechanism extends deep underground, beneath the flawless recreation of the palace bridge, entwined with its very foundations. If this device were disabled, the repercussions of the outage would reverberate throughout the entire structure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたが発見した断片は、計り知れないほど大きなもののほんの一部に過ぎないことに気づく。その機構は、宮殿の橋の完璧な再現の下に、その基礎と絡み合って深く地下に延びている。この装置が停止すれば、その影響は構造全体に波及するだろう。{/n}
